entry.title: Re: Relacja lutowego Stammtisch'u Katowickiej Grupy SAPowej
entry.content: @ŁukaszPęgiel mam nadzieję, że też uda Ci się dołączyć na któreś z następnych SAP Stammtisch 🍺

entry.title: Re: Is SAP involved in refreshes that are executed via th...
entry.content: Hi Karen, Thanks for responding. So, SAP is not involved by any means and the entire process is automated right..? Sometimes we get to select the schedule data the very next day and while in other cases, we could select the date only 2-3 after the current date. Any reasons for this. I am aware SAP wont' do refresh on weekends.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 6
entry.content: Hi there - this is not the right place to ask a question - please head over to Technology Q&A and ask there, tagging it with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model too. Please also make sure you supply more detail - as it stands, it would be quite hard to give you an answer anyway. Good luck!

entry.title: 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in schema SAP_PAPM' while activating a join
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have built a 'Model Table' on top of which I have built a join function type to aggregate the data. Upon activating this join function, we are facing a strange issue - 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in schema SAP_PAPM' . Below is the screenshot.

Please let us know as to how we could fix this issue.

Thank you,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: Re: Relacja lutowego Stammtisch'u Katowickiej Grupy SAPowej
entry.content: @Vitaliy-R jak zawsze zapraszamy do Katowic (dwa kolejne terminy już są wyznaczone, więc może uda Ci się dołączyć na któryś z nich lub w następnych terminach)

entry.title: Re: Announcement: New release of content and central entry point for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams

Regards

Sandip

entry.title: Re: Relacja lutowego Stammtisch'u Katowickiej Grupy SAPowej

entry.title: Re: Addressing Common Questions and Complaints About the New Platform
entry.content:
Hi @jerryjanda ,

Perhaps this is already on your radar but to be on the safe side I mention regarding the section "Sorting tag feeds/notifications by content type" that,

on managed tag pages we would need not only the separation per Blog and Q&A but additional filtering options for the Q&A like answered, unanswered, accepted (just like it was on the previous platform).

Thanks,
Ervin

entry.title: Re: Connection SAP IDM to IPS (BTP)
entry.content:
Hello, 

we followed the informations of the document step by step but we cannot launch the job because we have 400 or 401 returns.

we created the administrator as follows

we created the proxy as such

we have exported the proxy in CSV and imported in the admin console of IDM then complete the data AUTH_USER and AUTH_PASSWORD with the client ID and secret of the administrator SAP_IDM2 and put the SCIM_ASSIGNMENT_METHOD to PUT

Do you have any idea what might cause these errors or how to test the connection other than with the initial IDM Load job?

regards

entry.title: Re: FAGL_FC_VAL SOLUTION (CUSTOMIZING)
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing the same requirements from my client. Do you have a solution for that already?

BR

Zheng

entry.title: Screen layout LFA1-SPERR S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello All

In the transaction FK05, the posting block filed is locked for change as you can see in the screenshot below:

Can someone know how where to find the screen layout of this field to change it?

I didn't find it here :

Thanks in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Mobile Addons SP 10 instalation fails on ERP 6.0 EPH 7
entry.content: The problem has been solved by upgrading kernel (tools) - R3trans, tp DBSL lib. After upgrading these tools import worked without errors.

entry.title: Intrastat Intercompany Scenario SAP S4 Help Needed
entry.content: IF we are creating Sales order in Italy sales area and the intercompany plant is from Germany Sales Org .The intercompany document is created for company code for Swiss  . When we created provider information the below intercompany document is not showing when we run VE01 T-code . The Information provider creation which we are doing we have an option of company code and plant so in such situation how this can be created . Can i get some information or step by step guidance?

entry.title: Questions about PERS_HANDLE and ADDR_PERSON_NUMBER_GET, changing BP Company to Person
entry.content:
Hello, 

I was given an assignent to create a tool that changes a BP entered as a company to a person 

this is done by changing the TYPE in BUT000 changing ADRC PERS_HANDLE to 'X'.

The problem I encountered is I was asked to use FM ADDR_PERSON_NUMBER_GET I dont really understand what it does to my knowledge it will retrieve the next avaliable PERS Number avaliable to be distributed.

My main problem is that I couldnt find what a person handle is and would be greatfull if any information can be given in regards to it or any information that might be usefull regarding the FM or generall information in case anyone has done anything similar.
Thank you for your reply in advance take care!

entry.title: Re: Step By Step PI\PO Mail Adapter OAuth 2.0 Configuration with Office365
entry.content:
Hello RonSterren,

 

You can create ticket to BC-XI-CON-MAI component  by mentioning details about issue along with XPI trace, We will check and process it.

Thanks & Regards,

Vamsi.

entry.title: change sender for manual rejection letters
entry.content:
Hi all,
Is it possible to change the sender from manual rejection letters to candidates?
Today the sender is automatically the recruiters personal email. Would prefer to have a "do not reply" email available to choose as well.

Thanks for any ideas.

entry.title: Re: Suite Reporting Collaboration Hub
entry.content:
Dear Dominic, 

thank you for your question. Please refer to our Step-by-Step Tutorial on Process Model Dashboards in the SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub. It explains you in detail which dashboards can be found. 

In general you get the following overview: 

  • Models created and used within the organisations
  • Review key statistics on used, reviewed, and commented models
  • Usage of the current workspace

Hope that helps. Warm regards, 
Cäcilia

entry.title: Transport from Development to 2 test Systems
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i have 1 Development System connected to 2 Test Systems.

I have transported all my objects to the first Test System successfuly. Now i need to transport all the objects once again to the second Test System.

When i try to do it, i get the error that the package is already assigned to the first Test System.

What is the best way to do this? 

I am aware of the Transportgroup, but i don't want to simultaneously transport objects to both systems because their purpose may differ in the future.

entry.title: Re: Looking for Cost effective solution for our Multitena...
entry.content:
Dear Andrew, Thank you for your Reply, We have 3 applications deployed and we have around 30 clients so we would be needing 90 routes in total as of today. and we also expect it grows over the time. buying extra quota is not feasible as the infrastructure costs more than the product cost. we explored the option of using Custom Domain out IT was not impressed as we have extra maintainance effort in maintaining domain and SSL certificate.

In the below Blog where the customer is having similar problem there is a suggestion from SAP where they suggested Hybrin model, can you throw some light on this? https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/operating-a-multi-tenant-solution-on-btp-cf-1-gb-runtime-10-routes/qaq-p/12529096

Also, we came across a statement where we heard it is possible to use multitenancy without creating extra routes if we have CAP solution in Place. it dint make sense to me, could you please confirm on this.

entry.title: Re: ABAP & http, why can’t we just have something nice?
entry.content:
Hi @ajith_urimajalu ,

yes we have a separate roadmap item for the 2025 on-Prem Release, see here: Integration Services | SAP Help Portal "Outbound HTTP/RFC: Connectivity Enablement".

The aim of ABAP Cloud is to also have a unified programming model for cloud and On-Prem. The existing programming model for outbound communication in the cloud will stay valid. Due to the different release cycles the feature will be available first in the public cloud, before it is available for On-Prem.

Best regards,
Daniel

entry.title: Re: How to Maintain Exchange Rates in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi mikaelquesnot,

great post, thank you for the overview.

Do you know whether there is the option to export the market rates automatically via an API to other third party systems that rely on exchange rates? For example, when doing the billing in an external system and you want to have the accurate exchange rates on the billing document automatically.

Kind regards,

Tom

entry.title: Re: Suite Reporting Collaboration Hub
entry.content: Dear Cäcilia, Thank you very much for your quick reply. Is it possible to create your own dashboards? Or are only the two variants available? Many thanks and best regards Dominic

entry.title: Re: Signavio process insights starter pack 1 time upload...
entry.content:
Hello Wongskorn,

With the SAP Signavio starter pack for RISE with SAP you can use the full functionality of SAP Signavio Process Insights based on a one-time data load from your productive ERP system. This data load capacity into the SAP Signavio Process Insights is 50GB in the starter pack.

How you do this is described in more detail under Onboarding in the Administration Guide for SAP Signavio Process Insights.

Best regards

Prateek

entry.title: Re: Looking for Cost effective solution for our Multitena...
entry.content: Dear Andrew, Thank you for your Reply, We have 3 applications deployed and we have around 30 clients so we would be needing 90 routes in total as of today. and we also expect it grows over the time. buying extra quota is not feasible as the infrastructure costs more than the product cost. we explored the option of using Custom Domain out IT was not impressed as we have extra maintainance effort in maintaining domain and SSL certificate. In the below Blog where the customer is having similar problem there is a suggestion from SAP where they suggested Hybrin model, can you throw some light on this? https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/operating-a-multi-tenant-solution-on-btp-cf-1-gb-runtime... Also, we came across a statement where we heard it is possible to use multitenancy without creating extra routes if we have CAP solution in Place. it dint make sense to me, could you please confirm on this.

entry.title: Re: How to use Patch Action in Build Process Automation (...
entry.content: Thanks Dinesh! I was close, but made a small mistake in adding the parameter. Your screenshots helped me to get it to work 🙂

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets Revaluation in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi Dizem,

Please, take a look to the Note https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3093762. You need to set Depreciation calculation base Monthly.

Kind regards,

Ganna

entry.title: Re: Cost center based release strategy.
entry.content: Hello! Did you solve your query? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Suite Reporting Collaboration Hub
entry.content:
Hi Dominic,

for now it is not possible to create your own dashboards. An alternative might be to use the "Reporting" function in the Process Manager. It allows you to create reports based on your needs. Please find more information in our documentation under Reports.

Warm regards, 
Cäcilia

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 6
entry.content:
Here are the resources mentioned in this episode:

  • This week's SAP Developer News https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hHPTbdgvvFk
  • SAP CodeTalk playlist https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQB4SrWDL_VpeZnDJ1pcLRpA
  • Edge Integration Cell playlist https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQAy8g4peerZFjOu9Hxf4TyZ 
  • February Developer Challenge on CAP plugins, week 3 https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/february-developer-challenge-cap-plugins-week-3/td-p/13614397 
  • The small repo accompanying this series, now containing `test.http` https://github.com/qmacro/capb2b 
  • (Capire) Aspect `cuid` https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/common#aspect-cuid 
  • RFC Request For Comments https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Request_for_Comments
  • Atom Publishing Protocol RFC5023 https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5023 
  • HTTP 1.1 RFC2616 https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5023
  • UUID RFC4122 https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc4122 
  • Nomenclature https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nomenclature 
  • (Capire) Domain Modeling - Prefer Canonic Keys https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/domain-modeling#prefer-canonic-keys 
  • (Capire) Built-in Types https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/types#built-in-types 
  • Crypto: randomUUID() method in Node.js https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Crypto/randomUUID 
  • Bash "here strings" with `<<<` https://tldp.org/LDP/abs/html/x17837.html 
  • (Capire) SQLite - Persistent Databases https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-sqlite#persistent-databases 
  • The @cap-js/sqlite package on NPM https://www.npmjs.com/package/@cap-js/sqlite
  • (Capire) cds.utils - Method: uuid() https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-utils#uuid 
  • (Capire) Tools - cds repl https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/tools/#cds-repl

entry.title: Re: DTW add new items duplication
entry.content: Kevin, Unless you share some template with few examples, it would not be possible to find the cause, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Sync between SF Recruiting and otther application
entry.content:
Hi @-dk- 

you basically three options on how to integrate data with SuccessFactors Recruiting module.

  1. Use Legacy Recruting migration import from provisioning - this is applicable only for new instances for migration the data from another system
  2. Use sftp or rest connection from integration center - triggered by Successfactors, where it sends a request to your master ATS to obtain information from their API or from SFTP server in form of XML or JSON file
  3. Configure custom integration working with master ATS API and SuccessFactors OData API to synchronize the data between the two systems.

 

We usually use legacy import from csv on the go-live and than build a custom integration via OData API for our customers to sync information about job advertisements, candidates and their application, interview and other feedback or actions.

The OData API is well documented on https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/03e1fc3791684367a6a76a614a2916de.html?locale=en-US

Have a nice day, František

entry.title: Re: Archivelink question
entry.content:
Hi,

there is one solution for full automated integration of SAP attachments with any document management system, thus also with M-Files. That solution is a universal ArchiveLink connector and can answer all your requirements. It works with SAP ERP and S/4HANA on premise and private cloud.

Now I'm a bit surprised when you say  "Some documents will be created in SAP and sent to M-Files - these cases we know how to implement." because with ArchiveLink, this is really not obvious...

Indeed you need to:

1. On creation, capture the attachment binary and transfer it to M-Files + the necessary metadata retrieved from SAP

2. On Display in SAP, by default Archivlink is called... and then in the archiveling service you would need to call M-Files... 

Let me know if you wish to discuss this further !

entry.title: Re: SAP Developers YouTube
entry.content: Some of the HANA Academy videos are available in this channel https://www.youtube.com/@SAPopen

entry.title: Re: Is SAP involved in refreshes that are executed via the Instance Refresh Tool?
entry.content:
Dear Hari_Bhaskar03,

The refresh dates follows the SF maintenances, it means that SAP prevents you from scheduling it on dates that are for maintenance to avoid conflict.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Karen Perez

entry.title: API for creating planned HU without storage bin
entry.content:
Hi

Looking for an API for the creation of planned handling unit without passing the storage bin details.
Can you please provide some information on this.


Thanks

MG

entry.title: Create a oData server and add multiple entity
entry.content:
Hi, 
I want to create a only ONE Odata service with 4 tables from  SNWD_EPM model.

Set A. I can join the following 2 table (SNWD_PD, SNWD_BPA)  and add association

SNWD_PD
SNWD_BPA

Set B.  I can also join following following 2 tables ( SNWD_SO, SNWD_SO_I ) and add assiciation 
SNWD_SO
SNWD_SO_I
But problem is, if there is no relation between Set A and Set B how to i create only once oData Service with 4 tables.

entry.title: Inetum valora las certificaciones SAP para reforzar su compromiso con la excelencia y la innovación
entry.content:
SAP ha tenido la oportunidad de entrevistar a Ignacio Artiaga, director de Desarrollo de Negocio Estratégico SAP en Inetum. Inetum es una empresa europea líder en servicios y soluciones tecnológicas para impulsar la transformación digital. En la entrevista, Inetum esboza su camino hacia la adquisición de certificaciones SAP, discutiendo la importancia estratégica y los beneficios de las certificaciones. Inetum también describe cómo cubren todo el porfolio de soluciones SAP y tienen clientes en todos los segmentos de mercado.

Por favor comience describiendo su empresa y los servicios que ofrece.

INETUM es una empresa europea líder en servicios y soluciones tecnológicas, dedicada a impulsar la digitalización de empresas y organizaciones en los 27 países en los que opera. Con un enfoque centrado en el cliente, ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios que abarcan desde la consultoría y el desarrollo de software hasta servicios de infraestructura y gestión de datos.

En la actualidad, la compañía cuenta con más de 28.000 empleados, una facturación global de 2.400 millones de euros y 2.700 consultores SAP, lo que nos convierte en uno de los grandes players en esta tecnología.

En este ámbito en concreto, cubrimos todo el porfolio de soluciones SAP y contamos con clientes en prácticamente todos los sectores y segmentos de mercado, siendo nuestras principales fortalezas el foco en la calidad, nuestra amplia experiencia en soluciones cloud y nuestro conocimiento de ciertos sectores y áreas funcionales, como Retail&CPG, Sector Público o Recursos Humanos.

Ignacio Artiaga, director de Desarrollo de Negocio Estratégico SAP en Inetum

 

¿Por qué decidieron inicialmente (en 2008) obtener una certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner?

En 2008, decidimos obtener la certificación de la categoría de socio SAP Outsourcing Operations Partner con el objetivo de fortalecer nuestra posición como proveedores de servicios SAP de confianza. Esta certificación, a la que más tarde se unieron otras en outsourcing, ha consolidado nuestro compromiso con la excelencia en la prestación de servicios.

Contamos con certificaciones especializadas en Cloud and Infrastructure Operations, Hosting Operations, SAP BTP Operations, Business Suite Solutions Operations, SAP HANA Operations, SAP S/4HANA Solutions Operations y SuccessFactors Solutions Operations.

Asimismo, hemos adquirido competencias avanzadas en diversos campos, como Human Capital Management, con especializaciones en Compensation and Commission, Core HR and Payroll, Learning, Talent Management, Analytics and Planning, Application Development and Integration, Database and Data Management.

También hemos obtenido certificaciones en SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) con especialización en Commerce, Customer Data Platform, Marketing, Sales, and Service, así como en Spend Management y Supply Chain Management.

Adicionalmente, nos enorgullece destacar que somos Partner Center of Expertise, lo que nos capacita para la venta de licencias SAP y su mantenimiento. Estas certificaciones y competencias adicionales refuerzan nuestra posición como líderes en el sector y demuestran nuestro compromiso continuo con la calidad y la innovación en la entrega de soluciones SAP.

Como hemos visto, desde la primera certificación han expandido el alcance de las certificaciones, es decir no solo han ido recertificando, sino que han añadido certificaciones adicionales. ¿Cuál ha sido la razón?

El objetivo de ampliar nuestras certificaciones SAP está enmarcado dentro de nuestra búsqueda constante de la excelencia y de la mejora continua. A medida que evolucionan el panorama tecnológico y las necesidades de nuestros clientes, hemos considerado esencial ampliar nuestras certificaciones para aportar un mayor valor a nuestros clientes.

La consecución de nuevas certificaciones no solo refleja nuestro compromiso con la actualización y la especialización en las últimas tecnologías y estándares SAP, sino que también nos permite acompañar a los clientes en una variedad más amplia de servicios y desafíos empresariales.

Al contar con un mayor abanico de certificaciones, estamos mejor preparados para ofrecer servicios más integrales y adaptados a las necesidades específicas de los diferentes sectores y líneas de negocio.

Recientemente han obtenido la certificación SAP BTP Operations. ¿Cuál fue el factor decisivo para optar a esta certificación? ¿Qué beneficios han obtenido con ello?

La decisión de obtener la certificación de SAP BTP Operations fue motivada por nuestro compromiso con la innovación en las tecnologías emergentes y nuestra aspiración de ofrecer servicios líderes en el sector. Un compromiso que viene desde 2017 con la creación del Centro de Excelencia Cloud, a través del cual, hemos centralizado actividades que incluyen análisis, prototipado, creación de soluciones personalizadas en SAP BTP y la implementación y soporte de proyectos en soluciones cloud, asegurando cobertura global y eficacia continua en este ámbito.

Por tanto, elegir esta certificación se fundamentó en el reconocimiento de que SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) representa un avance significativo en la manera en que las empresas manejan y aprovechan sus datos y procesos comerciales.

De modo que el factor decisivo para buscar esta certificación radica en nuestra determinación de ofrecer soluciones integrales que aprovechen al máximo las capacidades de esta plataforma. Con ella, estamos capacitados para proporcionar servicios especializados en operaciones dentro del entorno SAP BTP, lo que se traduce en una gestión más eficiente, mayor flexibilidad y un mejor aprovechamiento de las innovaciones tecnológicas para nuestros clientes.

Los beneficios asociados con esta certificación incluyen una mayor competencia para abordar proyectos complejos, acceso a recursos exclusivos e informaciones de primera mano, y la capacidad de proporcionar servicios más personalizados y adaptados a las necesidades específicas del mercado en el entorno SAP BTP.

¿En qué medida el mercado valora que cuentan con estas certificaciones?

El mercado valora positivamente que contemos con certificaciones en una amplia gama de áreas, desde operaciones de outsourcing hasta soluciones específicas como SAP BTP Operations. Estas certificaciones no solo respaldan nuestra capacidad para abordar proyectos complejos, sino que también indican nuestra disposición para adaptarnos a las últimas tendencias tecnológicas y responder a las necesidades cambiantes del mercado.

Por otro lado, las certificaciones SAP ofrecen beneficios integrales a nuestra empresa, fortaleciendo la credibilidad y confianza del cliente, resaltando nuestros puntos fuertes.

Además, ser un Partner Center of Expertise y contar con certificaciones en licenciamiento SAP refuerza nuestra posición como un proveedor confiable y autorizado. Esto no solo es crucial para la confianza de los clientes, sino que también puede influir en las decisiones de compra, ya que las organizaciones buscan socios que no solo ofrezcan soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas, sino que también estén respaldadas por las certificaciones y competencias necesarias.

¿Qué beneficios ven en las certificaciones de SAP?

Las certificaciones de SAP ofrecen una serie de beneficios significativos que impactan positivamente en diversas áreas de nuestras operaciones.

Por ejemplo, durante las auditorías, las certificaciones proporcionan una validación objetiva de nuestro cumplimiento con los estándares y prácticas recomendadas, asegurando la calidad y eficiencia de nuestros servicios. Las recomendaciones resultantes de estas auditorías nos brindan oportunidades para mejorar continuamente, afinar nuestras operaciones y mantenernos al día con las últimas mejores prácticas del sector.

Más allá de validar nuestro cumplimiento con estándares y prácticas recomendadas durante auditorías, estas certificaciones contribuyen al desarrollo y retención del talento, mejoran la eficiencia operativa y nos permiten alinearnos de manera más efectiva con las estrategias empresariales de nuestros clientes.

En última instancia, estas credenciales son un activo estratégico que respalda nuestro compromiso con la excelencia, la innovación y el éxito a largo plazo en un entorno digital dinámico.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Dynamic Email in Output Parameter Determination App
entry.content:
Hi Sachin,

Thanks for sharing this brilliant blog.

I have the below business requirement

- Dynamically determine the contact person in the Service Contract BO.

- Send an email notification (with PDF form attached) to the determined recipient once the service contract is released.

We were able to fulfil the first requirement of determining the contact person maintained in the service contract, but we have issues in automatic sending of the email. Could you please share your insights into how we can manage automatic sending of the email to the determined contact.

Thanks,

Siraj

entry.title: Not able to see SuccessFactors standard Fields mentioned in SAP Help documentation in sf pmsalesdemo
entry.content:
We have taken SuccessFactors standard fields from SAP Help Documentation for The Job Requisition but we are not able to see those fields into successfactors pmsalesdemo instance.

these are the standards fields that we taken from documentation

this is the URL of SF Standard Fields with description from where we took above mentioned fields.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RECRUITING/8477193265ea4172a1dda118505ca631/3aa56f951f1248519af32b4480ace68f.html

I want to know if the SAP documentation is older ? or we are missing some step to see exactly these fields in pmsaleddemo instance ? 

 

Thanks & Regards

Azhar

entry.title: Managing Profit Centres & Profit Centre Groups
entry.content:
Agenda of this blog is as follows: 

  • Profit Centre Configuration
  • Create Profit Centre Groups
  • Create Profit Centres

Profit Centre Configuration

The standard Hierarchy is a special type of profit centres group that contains all profit centres belonging to a controlling area and that reflects the organizational structure in Profit Centres Accounting. This is where you check your configuration related to Profit Centres.

Prerequisites:

App used: Manage Your Solution

SAP Business Role Required: SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT

To validate the configuration of Profit Centre, please follow the below steps:

  1. Search for the Manage Your Solution App
  2. Click on Configure Your Solution
  3. Select the Finance application area and the Master and Organizational Data sub area as shown below
  4. Click on Configure Profit Centre Item
  5. Here you will see Standard Hierarchy ‘YBPH’ is assigned to pre-configured controlling area ‘A000’. 
Note: 
  • Standard Hierarchy ‘YBPH’ is assigned to pre-configured controlling area ‘A000’. If you do not want to use the SAP’s default value, make sure to maintain assignment of the new value in ‘SAP Central Business Configuration > Configuration Activities > Define Profit Centre Standard Hierarchy in Controlling Area’. Reference task Transport Configuration to move the setting to Test and Production System.
  • If you want to rename the Profit Centre Group you can edit the name accordingly.

 -------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create Profit Centre Groups

You can use this app to search for profit centre groups as well as create, display, and edit profit centre groups.

Prerequisites:

App used: Manage Profit Centre Groups

SAP Business Role Required: SAP_BR_DIVISION_ACCOUNTANT

In the Realize Phase, during the setup of your SAP S/4HANA Cloud system, you must create a default profit centre and a default profit centre group in your quality system. Since master data changes are not transported to your production system, you must recreate these objects in your production system before you commence business. You create these master data objects in both systems using the Manage Profit Centres and Manage Profit Centre Groups, respectively.

Note: that you cannot create versions for the standard Hierarchy as a special profit centre group.

So now let us see how to create the Profit Centre Groups for the first time:

  1. Go to Manage Profit Centre Group App
  2. Filter with Controlling Area: A000 and Click on Go
  3. For the First time “In SAP’s pre-delivered standard content, a default profit centre standard hierarchy YBPH is already assigned to the controlling area A000. However, the profit centre group YBPH is not delivered since it belongs to the profit centre master data. So you need to create by Clicking on New button
  4. Enter the Name as of your above configuration(Profit Centre Configuration), I have chosen as A you can use YBPH itself and Click on Continue 
  5. Accordingly, you go ahead creating & adding the Child Groups

How to deal with the existing Profit Centre Group Scenario:

  1. Let’s say your standard Hierarchy Node is YBPH
  2. You have created new profit centre groups and those are not available for the selection during profit centre creation 
  3. Reason is Newly created Profit centre group is not created under Standard Hierarchy i.e. YBPH
  4. Let me reproduce above issue mentioned in the step 2 Here I am creating the Profit Centre Group i.e. TestAk which is not under YBPH
  5. Here I have created Profit Centre and child Profit centre group
  6. Now let me go to Manage Profit Centre App and create new profit centre with this Profit centre group
  7. So now how to fix this issue, let's continue..
  8. To make the new profit centre group created available for selection, you go ahead and create new child groups under standard delivered Hierarchy node i.e. YBPH
  9. Select Standard Hierarchy Node YBPH & Click on Edit
  10.  Click o New Child Group, lets add 2 child groups Atest1 & Atest2

 After this creation, I am expecting to see these 2 Profit centre Groups under value selection of Standard Hierarchy Node during Profit centre creation as shown below: 

Further you can refer the below video for your reference.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create Profit Centre

App used: Manage Profit Centre 

SAP Business Role Required: SAP_BR_DIVISION_ACCOUNTANT

Use this app to search for, create, view, and edit profit center master data. This app allows you to manage profit center master data in an easy-to-consume way.

In short in this app, you can Create, edit, copy, and delete a combination of a profit center and a validity period.

To create Profit Centre follow the below steps:

  1. Go to Manage Profit Centre app
  2. Enter the filters and look for any existing profit centres, if not click on Create button
  3. Fill the header information like Profit Center ID, Profit Centre name, Valid from, Valid  to, Person responsible, set the organizational unit details like Standard Hierarchy Node & Segment all these are mandatory fields and other informations. Here I have used the same Profit Centre Group i.e. Atest1 which is created as above section
  4. Click on Create

Important Links:

Help Portal:

Manage Profit Centers

Manage Profit Center Groups

Community:

Profit Centre is not creation in S/4 HANA Public Cloud

Knowledge Base Article(KBA):

Newly created Profit Centre Group not visible in app 'Manage Profit Centres'

Roadmap Viewer:

SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (2-system landscape)

Regards,

Ankit K

entry.title: Re: Ask and Comment About the Community Platform and Migration
entry.content:
Hi Jerry, 

Thanks for getting back to me. I've only ever had one ID, so there's no merge issue. 

Initially some blogs I definitely knew were not to be found. Some have now 'surfaced'. It seems like once I find and open them via Google then SCN search finds them too. According to my profile stats I've published 15 blogs. Trying to access them I hit against a number of issues:

  1. I can't see my blogs under my content. All I can see is "Posts". No blogs or ability to filter by blogs.


  2. If I search for my user or surname and type "Blog" it finds 3. See previous point, I can't think of or find any other way to search.


  3. The pages render randomly either shrunken or scrolled to the left or right (Safari on macOS, latest). The screenshot above is not scaled down, it's how it renders. Sometimes you see the page in original size for a split second before it does its thing. 

  4. "If you look at the Blog Dashboard box on that page, you should see View My Contributions." --> There is neither a Blog Dashboard Box nor anything labelled My Contributions on that page. I even tried searching on "Dashboard" and "Contribution".

I deliberately left a couple of weeks of 'settling in' before taking a peek at the new platform. I had high hopes, as the last platform was the main reason I moved away from SCN. But sadly things are not off to a good start. I'll keep trying and post further issues in the other blog you mentioned. At least we can now paste images like we could do two platforms ago, so that's a huge step forward.

Thanks & regards,
Mike

entry.title: Re: unable to get initial selection list in CM01
entry.content:
Executed SETCOPY1 Program from SA38 , Now I am able to access initial selection list.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: what is the best method to upgrade MS sql from 2014 t...
entry.content: Hi Sravs, What is the SPS level? In the Current SAP system are you having SPS level 18 and above? if it is yes then you can upgrade the MS Sql from Sql 14 to 19. Regards

entry.title: Re: Fixed Assets Revaluation in SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi Louie,

I think your issue is described in the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3361456. As I am not sure what account determination for your Fixed Asset is set, what transactions were made it is not possible to me to give advise what to do with clearing account. Maybe you need to think about messaging to Global Support Center.

Kind regards,

Ganna

entry.title: Re: Advance Shipping and Receiving (Planning and Execution) using Unified Package Building
entry.content:

But you must have set a speed-up factor for your video at least to 300%, don't you? The speed is terrific 😂

entry.title: CPQ usage
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer reported in their BTP cockpit where they can see some usage for Cash application and cash application is part of CPQ solution I believe. 

Can any of you kindly advise  is there any feature or tool in CPQ which can also tracking the inbound and outbound usage, please?

Kind Regards

Helinna

Thanks.

Carlos

entry.title: Re: 🇧🇪 SAP Build: Create Apps and Processes Without Coding (Ghent, Belgium)
entry.content:
Hi 

After the SAP Build CodeJam session in ghent last monday,  I tried to complete the tuturial, however I'm stuck in step 7, when triggering process from my app.  After testing the API-trigger, i got a response 500:



{ "message": "Request failed with status code 500", "name": "AxiosError", "stack": "AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500\n at Sr (https://ba8d8c66trial.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/axios-fa73bef5.js:135:1037)\n at XMLHttpRequest.b (https://ba8d8c66trial.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/axios-fa73bef5.js:135:4220)\n at ne.request (https://ba8d8c66trial.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/axios-fa73bef5.js:137:3098)\n at async u (https://ba8d8c66trial.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/useDestinations-cc2f603b.js:5:655)\n at ne.request (https://ba8d8c66trial.design-time.us10.apps.build.cloud.sap/assets/chunks/axios-fa73bef5.js:137:3098)", "config": { "transitional": { "silentJSONParsing": true, "forcedJSONParsing": true, "clarifyTimeoutError": false }, "adapter": [ "xhr", "http" ], "transformRequest": [ null ], "transformResponse": [ null ], "timeout": 0, "xsrfCookieName": "XSRF-TOKEN", "xsrfHeaderName": "X-XSRF-TOKEN", "maxContentLength": -1, "maxBodyLength": -1, "env": {}, "headers": { "Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*", "Content-Type": "application/json", "x-csrf-token": "b94ad8f296c492a38da8e9ae1fa2cc599076fc3b2104a53601122abb48d7027b", "x-requested-with": "XMLHttpRequest" }, "baseURL": "/destinations_api/v2/destination/spa_process_destination_USER2", "method": "post", "url": "", "data": "{\"headers\":{\"accept\":\"application/json, text/plain, */*\",\"content-type\":\"application/json\",\"authorization\":\"Bearer undefined\"},\"url\":\"\",\"method\":\"post\",\"data\":\"{\\\"definitionId\\\":\\\"us10.ba8d8c66trial.purchaseapproval.purchaseApprovalProcess\\\",\\\"context\\\":{}}\"}" }, "code": "ERR_BAD_RESPONSE", "status": 500 }

When I click on Check connection, i got:

 

 

 

 

 

 

Any suggestions to proceed

Thanks
Kr Lieven

entry.title: BALANCE QUANTITY FILED AND TABLE NAME
entry.content:
Hi There!

Can anyone plz let me know the table and field name for BALANCE QUANTITY in SAP.

entry.title: Re: CoCd &, ledger 0L: First Close the fiscal years befor...
entry.content:
In asset accounting you could have as much as 2 open fiscal years.

(There is a KBA - 2584908 - Error message AA761 - "Fiscal year change in co.code XXXX possible only after year-end closing YYYY" )

entry.title: Re: CPQ usage
entry.content:
Helinna

I work for SAP CPQ Product as solution Architect
Cash application and cash application is not part of CPQ consumption or usage to it.

only SAP Variant Configuration & Pricing and SAP Integration Suite or SAP Event Mesh which are integrated with SAP CPQ.

Kindly reach out to me if you need any info or details to it

entry.title: Re: Termination rule is not triggering if the termination date is the end date of the month.
entry.content:
Hi Hafeez, try to add an if condition in the accrual rule (not the termination rule) with the following:

if accruable end date = termination date

then

add the same details that you have in the termination rule.

Let me know if it works.

Thank you,

Soraia

entry.title: Re: Report header and extended attribute
entry.content:
Hi Alexandre,

you can use Entity Card to display ext.attribute values of Entities. See attached screenshot Entity.png with extended attribute "Attribute_1". You can also modify Model Card to display your customized stuff, but you cannot have any logic there, meaning you probably have multiple entities in your model and your report cannot resolve, which extended attribute of which entity you need to use. So in this case you need to create for example computed extended attribute at the model level and this extended attribute can be then displayed on the Model Card (green parts on the Model.png screenshot) or in separate Text paragraph (red parts on the Model.png screenshot).

However if you talk about modifying the Title page in the Report Properties, possibilities are very limited and I don`t know about any way, how to get extended attributes here. I`d suggest replacing the predefined Home page with your own page.

HTH,

Ondrej Divis

entry.title: Re: Profit.Segment on account assignment is not available
entry.content:
Did you

  • Activate CO-PA cross-client and client-specific?
  • Did you set the remated master data (characteristics)
  • DId you set the derivation rules
  • etc.

entry.title: Re: It has never been easier! Connecting cloud apps to Internet and on-premises systems using SAP BT
entry.content:
There was an adjustment missing in the transparent-proxy module, "Basis" adjusted it and CR Destination appeared.

Now the following error appears:

status:
conditions:
- lastUpdateTime: '2024-02-23T00:07:54.075455414Z'
message: Technical connectivity is not configured.
reason: ConfigurationError-ReferencedDestinationServiceInstance-NotProvided
status: 'False'
type: Available
- lastUpdateTime: '2024-02-23T00:55:54.418512862Z'
message: Technical connectivity is not configured.
reason: ConfigurationError-ReferencedDestinationServiceInstance-DoesNotExist
status: 'False'
type: Available

entry.title: Re: Item category 02000 is missing (obligatory in accounting transaction 0200/0
entry.content: @hein2000 did you ever resolve your issue? As I have come across a similar one, where there is a billing document with no posting to customer, there is reverse charge VAT though and this is causing that error.

entry.title: Re: Preparing for SAP Identity Management’s End-of-Maintenance in 2027
entry.content:
Hi Priyank,

thanks for the feedback.

In fact, we are currently working to also allow general purpose SCIM connectors directly with bundled SAP Cloud Identity  services - Identity Provisioning tenants. This will be a priced feature, though. Only connectivity towards SAP systems is available at no additional cost.

For your second question you are right, there's no other SAP on-premise product for identity management.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Migration to SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management
entry.content: Thanks Michael for insigths, with SAP TM or another module this will be objective transformations for future.

entry.title: Re: Stored Procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi,

You will have to write a TN on journal entry and it will trigger at every transaction. You can give a check on this. I do not have system in front of me to check before giving it to you. Apologies in case of any error.

IF :object_type = '30' AND (:transaction_type = 'A' OR :transaction_type = 'U') THEN

Declare ActCode varchar(100);

Declare TestUDF varchar(100);

 

select JDT1."Account"  , PCH1."U_TestUDF" Into ActCode, TestUDF from JDT1 Inner Join PCH1 On JDT1."CreatedBy" = PCH1."DocEntry" where JDT1."TransType" = 18 and PCH1."DocEntry" = :list_of_cols_Val_tab_del;

If (ActCode = '123' or ActCode = '234') And IfNull(TestUdf,'') = '' Then

SELECT '-1' INTO error FROM DUMMY;
SELECT 'Please enter a value in UDF';
END IF;

End If;

Regards

entry.title: Re: Sap AppBuilder IoS compilation error
entry.content: I think that i've found the issue, this seems related to firebase and notifications: i've added the get-token function, uploaded the firebase configuration file in building AND checked the "Push notifications" (without configuring them) in enabled capabilities of the respective provisioning profile in Apple developer portal.

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content:
Hi @nishantbansal91 

you can call the OData service in ECC from the ABAP Environment on BTP. There are multiple ways to establish the connection. The recommended way is described under "Connecting to a Remote Service" in this blog. However, cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_cloud_destination is also possible. The different options are explained in the SAP help documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/enable-http-communication-in-your-abap-code?locale=en-US&version=Cloud 

Best regards 
Bernhard

entry.title: BOM from RMWB
entry.content:
Hello, once I've created BOM from recipe in RMWB is there any way you can see the number of the recipe in CS02 CS03 it was created from?

 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: 'Error occurred while reading data from HANA Table in...
entry.content:
Hello,

Now this issue is resolved. It was an issue with one of the hierarchy we were bringing in from external system. One we removed this hierarchy name from the fields, it started working fine.

Thanks,

Soundarya C Adiga

entry.title: Re: How to change 'Started By' field value in SAP BPA process Instance
entry.content:
You have posted in the Welcome Corner, which may not be the best place for your topic. Can you try here: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-discussions/bd-p/buildersforum-board

The Welcome Corner is more of a hello world than a help desk.

entry.title: Queue error for CIF article master data transfer
entry.content:
Hello,

I faced strange error in #EWM after trying to transfer Article Master Data by #CIF. Site and Customer are transferred correctly but when added an Article to the IM and activate it, process ended with the following message in EWM inbound queue

In the integration model there is only one article and one site - 1001. All landscape settings in customization seems to be fine. What else could be wrong?

Thanks in advance.

Erick

entry.title: Re: Eclipse ATC Links only open in internet explorer

entry.title: Using OData in a Ui-Integration Card (Component)
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I want to Consume OData from Backend in a Component-Ui Card. 
I tried to read the whole O-Data Service, but I alwasy get the Error 404. 

I have attached my manifest.json. 
Is someone faceing this issue ? 

 

{
	"_version": "1.52.0",
	"sap.app": {
		"id": "my.component.sample.requestData",
		"type": "card",
		"i18n": "i18n/i18n.properties",
		"title": "Sample of a Component Content",
		"subTitle": "Sample of a Component Content",
		"applicationVersion": {
			"version": "1.0.0"
		},
        "dataSources": {
            "processChainDevDS": {
                "uri": "{{destinations.tss057}}/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSF_SFLIGHT_MD_ODATA_SRV",
                "type": "OData",
                "settings": {
                    "odataVersion": "2.0"
                }
            }
        },

		"shortTitle": "A short title for this Card",
		"info": "Additional information about this Card",
		"description": "A long description for this Card",
		"tags": {
			"keywords": [
				"Component",
				"Card",
				"Sample"
			]
		}
	},
	"sap.ui": {
		"technology": "UI5",
		"icons": {
			"icon": "sap-icon://technical-object"
		},
		"deviceTypes": {
			"desktop": true,
			"phone": true,
			"tablet": true
		}
	},
	"sap.ui5": {
		"rootView": {
			"viewName": "my.component.sample.requestData.View",
			"type": "XML",
			"async": true,
			"id": "app"
		},
		"dependencies": {
			"minUI5Version": "1.116",
			"libs": {
				"sap.m": {},
				"sap.ui.core": {}
			}
		},
		"contentDensities": {
			"compact": true,
			"cozy": true
		},
		"models": {
			"products": {
				"type": "sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel"
			},
			"oDataModel": {
				"dataSource": "processChainDevDS",
                "settings": {
                    "defaultBindingMode": "TwoWay",
                    "defaultCountMode": "InlineRepeat",
                    "useBatch": true
                }
			}
		}
		
	},
	"sap.card": {
		"type": "Component",
		"configuration": {
			"destinations": {
				"tss057": {
					"name": "tss057",
					"label": "T57",
					"defaultUrl": "/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZSF_SFLIGHT_MD_ODATA_SRV"
					
				}
			}
		},
		"header": {
			"title": "Top {parameters>/productsCount/value} Products"
		},
		"content": {
			"minHeight": "10rem"
		}
	}
}

 




Thanks in Advance 
Thomas

LPandey

entry.title: Experte für Interview gesucht! SAP Professional Service
entry.content:
Hallo Zusammen,

ich schreibe gerade meine Bachelorthesis mit Thema aufwandsbezogene Fakturierung in SAP S/4HANA und suche Experten für ein Interview. Meine Leitfragen sind:

  1. Wie sieht der Übergang von DPP-Profilen/CS in ERP zum Nachfolger S/4HANA aus?
  2. Wie sieht das aufwandsbezogene Fakturieren in SAP S/4HANA aus und welche Möglichkeiten gibt es?

    Die Antworten des Interviews sind ausschließlich für meine Bachelorarbeit gedacht.

    Bei Interesse gerne auf mich zukommen 😊

    Ich freue mich auch, wenn ihr meine Anfrage teilt oder weiterleitet.

    Danke und Grüße Nora

entry.title: Re: Service Consumption Model 2 for OData Client Proxy
entry.content:
@bernhard_grusie I have created the Service consumption but while creating the communication scenario on BTP ABAP I am not able to select the Service in the outbound tab. 

I don't understand how to create the custom communication scenario for the newly created service consumption

entry.title: Re: Transport from Development to 2 test Systems
entry.content:
Here are 3 community questions and answers and a blog post related to your question I found searching here.

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/stms-transport-routes-multiple-clients-and-systems/qaq-p/11014954
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/transport-domain-multiple-transports-directories/qaq-p/5067580
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/transport-to-multiple-client-using-solman-charm/qaq-p/9455246
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-move-transports-to-multiple-quality-clients-systems-in-charm/ba-p/13374361

Some may reference obsolete practices; you will need to vet in your landscape.

entry.title: Text forwarding with different language keys (SD order -> BANF ->PO->EDI-Orders)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have the following problem:

SD order: Customer has defined EN as language key -> Texts are also defined with EN within the order
BANF: Texts are transferred with language key EN
Purchase order: Texts are transferred but with the language key of the supplier (DE)
EDI orders: Texts are not transferred in IDOC because different language keys are used in order + BANF and PO

According to SAP notes it is standard behavior - > are there already customers with similar problems and solutions?

Thanks

Nicolai

entry.title: Re: 401 - Application Backend - SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi @Venkat_Vyza 

I don't see where the answer can be marked as a solution, do you know where?

entry.title: PLM - RMWB tcode.. EC Score & EC score without water values needs to be retained after final SAVE
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to retain the EC Score and EC Score without water values after the consistency check and hitting on the final save button. Now, the EC value gets cleared if the 'Greenlist2' value is 'Yes'. This falls under the Environmental Safety Data pertaining to a specification.

Currently both the values are retained until the save button is clicked. Kindly help in achieving the same or is it possible?  Tcode RMWB, PLM system.

entry.title: Re: Improved UX Design of the Value Help Dialog
entry.content:
Hi,

How to add include and exclude button in value help dialog.

entry.title: Re: Advance Script Slow Performance in SAC for Planning D...
entry.content:
How much seconds are being spend on preparation vs execution steps -> you can see in data action monitor?

Can you try adding the account you read from with RESULTLOOKUP() also in the MEMBERSET?
That way the engine doesn't need to fetch them in middle of operation.

Potentially like this:

 

MEMBERSET [d/MID_ACCOUNT_LT_PT] = BASEMEMBER([d/MID_ACCOUNT_LT_PT].[h/parentId] , "FI_CALCOPS_0015"),BASEMEMBER([d/MID_ACCOUNT_LT_PT].[h/parentId] , "FI_CALCOPS_0010")

entry.title: VIP Virtual Program – Strategic Product Roadmap Update H1 2024 (APJ/EMEA)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Register Now" button or "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the event invite and login details. 

 

Session Information:

Join us to hear about the Solution Roadmap and broader view on the strategy and the direction that SAP SuccessFactors is taking for 2024 and beyond.
New: Please note the session will have available closed captions as well as ZOOM automatic close caption translation. (Available languages: Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, German, French and many more!)
 

 
APJ & EMEA Session - April 23rd 2024
15:00 SGT Singapore
9:00 CET Europe

REGISTER HERE!

 

If you have any questions, please get in touch with your Regional Program Manager: 

For Americas karla.trevino@sap.com

For Europe, Middle East & Africa samanta.ferreri@sap.com

For Asia Pacific, Japan & Greater China vanesa.medricka@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Mass Copy of files from old DMS Server to new DMS Server
entry.content:
Hi Ankur,
For more information on migration options please see also the blog https://blogs.sap.com/2019/12/09/content-repository-migration-in-mind/. 

Here you should get a lot of details on how file data can be migrated from one server to another for example. 

Br

Christoph

entry.title: Re: IBP - Editable key figure only editable on lowest (ba...
entry.content:
Hi Vincent,

There are no standard ways to my knowledge at Excel Addin level. Of course there are procedures at Data Integration App level by file and CI-DS methods using maintenance in Global Configuration App.

Now, I can see only one way out using VBA Hooks. You can make use of IBPBeforeSend Hook in which you can write code to make it send the changes only if the KF is available in Base Level, else you can return the error(say 'KF not updated in base planning level') and stop the data from writing into cloud.

Use the link IBPBeforeSend Application help to help yourself with the complete detailing of the IBPBeforeSend Hook with the relevant example that may help you.

Best Regards,

'Riyaz'

entry.title: How to restrict user on authorization objects in Business Roles?
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

I want to segregate user based on read, write and display roles. How can I do this?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict user on authorization objects in Busi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

In S/4HANA Cloud, restriction fields are organized in restriction types. Restriction types that contain general organizational restriction fields can be found in the top section called General. These restriction types contain only one restriction field. The settings you make for the single restriction types sum up to the authorization that is granted to the business role and therefore to the assigned business users.

Using the Maintain Business Roles app, you have the following options for maintaining restrictions:

In the Maintain Restrictions UI, you can maintain restrictions for business roles. These restrictions are the basis of authorizations that are granted to the business users who are assigned to this business role. The business catalog defines which access categories are available for maintaining and for which fields restriction values can be maintained.

The following access categories are available:
  • Write, Read, Value Help (write access)
  • Read, Value Help (read access)
  • Value Help (value help access)

The available restriction fields represent the authorization-relevant attributes of the business objects that are used in a role. Authorization for these fields can be granted on write, read or value help level (for example for a particular sales area).

You can select or enter single values (pre-defined by SAP or customer-specific configuration) and ranges.

 

Please check the procedure and more details regarding the restrictions in SAP Help Portal | How to Define Authorizations Based on Restrictions

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP PO DMS Attachment not getting display In SAP fior...
entry.content:
Hi Sohel,

regarding this behavior please see the proposals in the SAP KBA 2438154 - "My inbox: Attachments created in PO/PR not displayed in case of Release Strategy- SAP S/4HANA". 

Br

Christoph

entry.title: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
It's been over six months since my initial blog post on the Talent Intelligence Hub, offering a comprehensive overview of this solution. In case you missed it, you can find it here: - Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessF... - SAP Community.

Since its General Availability in the second half of 2023, Talent Intelligence Hub has undergone many updates. I'll share a few key updates relevant to 2024 in this blog.

Talent Intelligence Foundation

We have recently made some changes to the terminology of the peripheral components of talent intelligence hub to enhance clarity. For example, what was previously called the "Skills Ontology" is now called the "Talent Intelligence Foundation." It's important to note that Talent Intelligence Foundation is not a Skills Library! It is a foundation of skills that will allow us to support skills matching and skill inferences.

NOTE: We are creating our baseline talent intelligence foundation by combining 3 databases (Lightcast, O*NET, & ESCO). Customers will not see or interact with the Talent Intelligence Foundation at all. It will be present and used in the skills inference process. As the name suggests, it is a 'foundation for skills used in the inference process.' It is not a skills library.

To understand Talent intelligence foundation better, let's know what is 'AI-Inference' and, more specifically, what is 'skills inference.'

What is Inferencing?

An inference is an idea or conclusion drawn from evidence and reasoning. An inference is an educated guess. Making inferences is a way of connecting unknown information with the known. To do this, you analyze events, facts, ideas, and objects and compare them with what you already know.

AI Inferencing is the process of running live data through a trained AI model to make a prediction. (Source – IBM Research article https://research.ibm.com/blog/AI-inference-explained

We make inferences in everyday life.

Example: Emily sees chocolate stains on her daughter's face and dress, notices more chocolate stains on the refrigerator handle. Emily infers that her daughter opened the refrigerator and ate some of the chocolate cake.

You meet a colleague for the first time in person, and you see she's wearing a 'cat mom' sweater and has a custom coffee cup that says 'crazy cat lady'; you infer that your colleague loves cats!

What is Skill Inferencing?

Using natural language processing (NLP), AI-driven Skill Inference is a technique to extract employee skills from a variety of unstructured data sources (e.g., emails, chats, images, video footage, text, and so on).

It's common for HR Applications, including SuccessFactors, for employee skills-related data to be stored in several places within the suite and in various formats. This data often describes what they do, how they progress within an organization, their strengths, capabilities, feedback received, performance reviews, development goals, learnings, certifications, project accomplishments, and more. Managing this data and drawing conclusions about an employee's Skills portfolio can be complex. Skill inference helps by bringing together insights from these different sources, creating one reliable Skills Portfolio for each employee.

Skill Inferencing in Talent Intelligence Hub

Now that we have clarified the definitions, let's look into how skill inference plays a role in talent intelligence hub, especially with talent intelligence foundation.

Talent intelligence foundation is our intended approach to skills and talent strategy to help SAP SuccessFactors customers be future-ready.

   It's a four-step process, as depicted in the figure.

Step 1

Our AI-infused Skill Inference uses machine learning (ML) algorithms to extract the digital footprints generated by employees as they interact with 3rd-party applications, leading Skills databases, collaboration tools, and internal data, i.e., from the SuccessFactors suite solutions. The data extraction is limited to semantic info about 'skills' using natural language processing (NLP), which helps translate unstructured data to structured input, almost like autocorrect!

 Step 2

The structured skills data is then validated with SAP's trained machine learning model: talent intelligence foundation.

Step 3

Next, the system sends the inferred skills data to Attributes Library to check if there is an exact match for the skill in the Attributes Library.

Step 4

The skill is displayed as a 'recommended skill' in the employee's Growth Portfolio if a match is found.

The skill inferencing system works as a connector between the source system (for example, Microsoft Graph or SAP SuccessFactors Continuous Performance Management) and Talent Intelligence Hub.

NOTE:This feature is in the Restricted Availability phase. To test this feature in your environment, please email SAPSuccessFactorsEACPrograms@sap.com.

Here's a great video from one of LinkedIn's influencers, Bernard Marr, where he explains Unstructured data vs Structured data.

Skill Inference Sources (Early Adopter)

  • Skill Recommendations based on Microsoft 365 Graph data

If the Microsoft Azure Client application is set up in your environment and the email ID of an employee in Microsoft Azure matches the email ID in SAP SuccessFactors, the skill inferencing system can create skill recommendations based on skill terms in the data from Microsoft Graph. The skills data is extracted from the following Microsoft APIs:

  • Outlook calendar invitations
  • Teams Team names and descriptions
  • Distribution lists

For example, if an employee is in multiple Microsoft Teams that has 'Finance' as a common term in the Teams name or in description, the skills inferencing system learns that the employee is interested in financial management skills. The skill inferencing system then checks if there's an exact match for the skill name in the customer's Attributes Library. If a match is found, the skill is displayed as a recommended skill in the employee's Growth Portfolio.

  • Skill Recommendation based on CPM data

Activities, Achievements, and Feedback in Continuous Performance Management (CPM) reflect the work an employee is doing within the organization and can be used to infer skills for the employee. As more employees continue to build a portfolio of activities, achievements, and feedback, they're likely to acquire new skills that may not otherwise be captured.

Note: Learn more about configuring this option - SAP Help Portal

  • Skill Recommendation from External Skills Databases, licensed by customer (*Roadmap)          

We will support the ingestion of data from external data sources of the customers' choice, and the data quality will, in part, determine the quality of inferences. The customer must have a direct license with the external Skills vendor they intend to use for skills inference (*Roadmap).

Other TIH Highlights for 2024

Import/Export Template for Talent Intelligence Hub Entities

Talent Intelligence Hub leverages Integration Center (IC) for importing and exporting entities. As a one-time activity, It's easy to set up a recurring job (daily, weekly, etc.) to import and export data from talent intelligence hub.

We have provided integration definition files, so you don't have to build one from scratch. You can download the templates from SAP Business Accelerator Hub:

  • Link to Import Templates
  • Link to Export Templates

This package provides import/export templates for Attributes, Tags, Behaviors, Attribute to Tag Mapping, and Attribute to Behavior Mapping.

Importing SkillsPlex data to Talent Intelligence Hub

Using the delivered import templates, you can now import SkillsPlex data into Talent intelligence hub. This package provides data files for SkillsPlex Attributes, Tags, and Attribute to Tag Mappings.

Link to SkillsPlex Import Template

Attributes Library and Attribute Sources

The attributes library is organized by attribute types and tags. Customers can use the Integration Center to populate these libraries from a 'source' of choice.

 Team Portfolio for Managers

Managers can now view or edit the Growth Portfolio of their direct reports. The Team Portfolio provides a snapshot of direct reports' skills and skill gaps for the manager. Managers need role-based permissions to view their direct reports' growth portfolios.

Managers can:

  • By default, the Team Portfolio screen shows all direct reports. However, the view is limited to 30 people at a time. You can add or remove people to the list based on your preference.
  • Use filters to search for people by attributes, tags, and proficiency levels.
  • Add or remove attributes from an individual's or everyone's Growth Portfolio.
  • Assign proficiency levels for newly added attributes. Managers can also modify the proficiency level for existing attributes in an individual's Growth Portfolio.

Talent Intelligence Hub – Available features as of 2H2023 and EA

Here's a list of #talentintelligencehub features and HXM suite use cases available with 2H2023 release.

 

Talent Intelligence Hub – 2024 and Roadmap items

There's an impressive list of existing and upcoming use cases in 2024. Here's a list of some of the key roadmap items. Recruiting is getting a lot of AI love in 2024 release. Career Explorer, powered by SAP Business AI service, currently recommends career opportunities (roles) to employees based on the career paths of the people who are similar to them in the organization. Going forward it will also use Skills as a data source for personalized career path recommendations. There's also 'skills tagging' for learning content in the roadmap, which aims to remove the manual work by learning admins to assign skill(s) to learning content.

 

Talent Intelligence Hub – Dashboards and Story Reports

There are two standard dashboards available as of 2H 2023 - Admin Dashboard and Manager Dashboard.

Admin Dashboard

The Admin Dashboard provides a concise view of the attributes, tags, behaviors, and more that's available in the Talent Intelligence Hub Attributes Library for an HR Administrator.

Note: The report considers the logged-in user’s locale to display the data. In case, Attributes /Tags/Attribute Types are not maintained in logged in user locale, then the count displayed may vary for the logged in user.

The template is now available on Import -Content Store in Report Center. The title of the template story is SF_TIH_Talent_Intelligence_Hub_HR_Admin_Dashboard_v1.0.

Manager Dashboard

The Manager Dashboard provides managers an overview of Team Members’ proficiency levels, any proficiency gaps, areas of strength, and opportunities for development.

You can filter the report by Attribute type, Attribute, User, and Proficiency level. There are two Pages provided:
  • Attribute Overview
  • Attribute Gaps

The template is now available on Import -Content Store in Report Center. The title of the template story is SF_TIH_Talent_Intelligence_Hub_HR_Manager_Dashboard_v1.0.

Note: We highly recommend that you make another copy of this story and make necessary changes. Please avoid updating the imported story, as your changes are over-written if the story is re-imported from Content Store.

Stories in People Analytics

Other than utilizing these dashboards, you can also create Story Reports with data from Talent Intelligence Hub. These Story Reports in People Analytics can be used for audit purposes. You can report on data for the following entities in Talent Intelligence Hub.

  • Attributes

  • Attribute Types

  • Tags

  • Growth Portfolio

  • Behaviors

  • Proficiency Level

  • Proficiency Set

Talent Intelligence Hub – Data Structure

Talent intelligence hub comprises of three key elements: 

  • Job Profile Builder
  • Attributes Library
  • Growth Portfolio (Team Portfolio is an additional view within Growth Portfolio for people managers, with necessary role-based permission)

I hope this information was helpful. Please refer to other talent intelligence hub related blogs:

Link to other blogs -

Talent Intelligence Hub and SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite Integration as of Release 2H 2023

SAP SuccessFactors Opportunity Marketplace & SAP Business AI-powered Recommendation

Talent Intelligence Hub & SAP SuccessFactors Learning Integration

SAP Help link for Talent Intelligence Hub - Talent Intelligence Hub | SAP Help Portal

Many thanks to @Julie Bartholic and @kanchanarao @Rebecca Reagan-Thieme for the collaboration.

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja,

Thanks for getting back to us!

In the meantime, we've managed to resolve the issue.

The error appeared on our on-premise system while carrying out step 1.C from this guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/ba879a6e2ea04d9bb94c7ccd7cdac446/17eb1a1d504442b3ad438451197b937b.html?locale=en-US

We had already set up a communication user and established the communication scenario SAP_COM_0936.

It turns out the authorization error was caused by using the User ID (CC*) instead of the actual User Name. After correcting this, the RFC connection now functions correctly.

Thanks again!

Kind regards,

Julian Kuipers

entry.title: Description with capital letters ignored in IBP excel
entry.content:
Came across a really strange issue. Updating the Product Description in master data, but it´s ignored in the planning view. 
4 examples and only the first, highlighted doesn´t work. If the first word in the description is all capital letters it´s ignored. But adding X or even a space it´s displayed correctly in the planning view.  

This is regardless of excel version, we tried with 2308, 2311 and 2402. 
Versions are not active in this PA.

entry.title: serial number maintenance
entry.content:
Hi All,
We have configurated serial number profile for which equipment’s creating back ground when
assigning serial numbers to material Through custom programme system assigning number ranges
from pre-configured number ranges, all these working fine, now but now client shared some legacy
files which having more than 10000 material with serial numbers and these serial numbers could be
conflict with all ready maintained number ranges, (may system will through error that serial number
already used) we need to upload this materials in system now so how we handle this situation.

Regards

rsk

entry.title: Re: SAP Marketing Cloud Release 2402 is Here!
entry.content:
Hi Silvia, et al.

We've implemented the new subdiveded child attribute for ID Origins, our use case was SAP Sales Cloud as the origin which returns the SAP Sales Cloud IDs.  This has saved us a lot of time, so fantastic enhancement!  We then went to do the same for Country > Regions, this worked, however, the subdivded regions (States/Counties/Provinces etc.) appear only as codes, not with the full descriptions (e.g., Texas).  We tried to ammend the attribute within the segmentation configuration app, but was unable to show the descriptions.  Is this possible, as perhaps we went about it the wrong way?

Regards

Bradley

entry.title: VIP Virtual Program – Strategic Product Roadmap Update H1 2024 (AMER/EMEA)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Register Now" button or "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the event invite and login details. 

 

Session Information:

Join us to hear about the Solution Roadmap and broader view on the strategy and the direction that SAP SuccessFactors is taking for 2024 and beyond.
New: Please note the session will have available closed captions as well as ZOOM automatic close caption translation. (Available languages: Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Thai, German, French and many more!)
 

 
AMER & EMEA Session - April 23rd 2024
10:00 EDT USA | Puerto Rico
16:00 CEST Europe

REGISTER HERE!

 

If you have any questions, please get in touch with your Regional Program Manager: 

For Americas karla.trevino@sap.com

For Europe, Middle East & Africa samanta.ferreri@sap.com

For Asia Pacific, Japan & Greater China vanesa.medricka@sap.com

entry.title: Re: logged-in sales employee appears by default in the sa...
entry.content:
Hi,

As Business Partner level is the first priority for default sales employee, there is no place to configure except FMS.

You can try this query and apply to FMS

 

select salesPrson from OHEM where userId=$[user]

 

Note: remember to link user and sales employee in Employee Master Data.

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Recipe Development RMWB Edit or Create Issue
entry.content:
Hello All,

In S4 system - SAP S4 2022 FPS 00, when I am accessing RMWB T code for editing or creating, the "CREATE" option is not showing up. Even though I have created some Recipes in the PLM FIORI UI application, when I am clicking on the hit list button, it is popping up "No data found" in SAP GUI application.

Can anyone help me in sorting this out ?

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Abdul Kalhisha

entry.title: Re: ADT Inheritance tree in Outline
entry.content:
(8 years later) I spent some time trying to figure out why "me" was pointing to my class in a method I could not see, only to discover that the tree view ignores inheritance. Thanks to the good old SAP GUI I could see the full structure.

"Not as highest prio" interpreted by Jim Carrey 😉

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an
entry.content:
Hi Ian, @IanStubbings 

it cannot be done easily, since on-premise and cloud landscapes have different user managements (on-premise user and SAP BTP user are different users). Our development investigates currently how the mapping between these user managements can be realized technically.

Best Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm currently grappling with a challenge within my SAP environment and could use some guidance.

I am seeking assistance in calculating the total number of books in my catalog entity. The objective is to enable users to input new books in bulk, with the system automatically updating the total count within the catalog entity.

Could anyone kindly advise on the best approach or provide insights into how this can be achieved within the SAP framework?

Your expertise and suggestions would be immensely appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Getting started with SAP BTP Solution Diagram
entry.content: @ajmaradiaga , thanks lot for your insights

entry.title: Re: EML Statement – MODIFY ENTITIES not working
entry.content:
Hello, 

Did you found the solution??
I'm getting Failed: Not Found, but the Sales Order exist.

Thanks,
Ines Martins
